Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 203 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. Show HN: Atomic – self-hosted, semantically-connected personal knowledge base 25 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Show HN: Termcraft – terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust 62 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. The seven hour explosion nobody could explain 71 upvotes, 8 comments
  5. Mamba-3 268 upvotes, 50 comments
  6. Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition 54 upvotes, 6 comments
  7. ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores 67 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record 470 upvotes, 131 comments
  9. Common Lisp Development Tooling 20 upvotes, 2 comments
  10. Some things just take time 434 upvotes, 145 comments
  11. The paddle wheel aircraft carriers of Lake Michigan 19 upvotes, 2 comments
  12. Do Not Turn Child Protection into Internet Access Control 238 upvotes, 77 comments
  13. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 110 upvotes, 31 comments
  14. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 161 upvotes, 55 comments
  15. Hide macOS Tahoe's Menu Icons 58 upvotes, 16 comments
  16. Professional video editing, right in the browser with WebGPU and WASM 38 upvotes, 10 comments
  17. Molly guard in reverse 204 upvotes, 83 comments
  18. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 1182 upvotes, 578 comments
  19. Hawaii's worst flooding in 20 years threatens dam, prompts evacuations 40 upvotes, 13 comments
  20. Esqueleto Tutorial 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Tinybox- offline AI device 120B parameters 195 upvotes, 114 comments
  22. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 77 upvotes, 45 comments
  23. Books of the Century by Le Monde 87 upvotes, 55 comments
  24. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 446 upvotes, 345 comments
  25. How Invisalign became the biggest user of 3D printers 115 upvotes, 81 comments
  26. No evidence cannabis helps anxiety, depression, or PTSD 106 upvotes, 81 comments
  27. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 289 upvotes, 296 comments
  28. Show HN: Joonote – A note-taking app on your lock screen and notification panel 32 upvotes, 26 comments
  29. No Semicolons Needed 24 upvotes, 21 comments
  30. A pig's brain has been frozen with its cellular activity locked in place 95 upvotes, 133 comments
